---
description: Convert a conversation/idea into a PRD saved under docs/prd/, matching mvp_scope_1.md's structure.
mode: agent
---

Full workflow and PRD template (canonical): `.claude/skills/to-prd/SKILL.md` — read it and follow it.

Read `docs/prd/mvp_scope_1.md` first to match shape. Cross-check scope against root `CLAUDE.md`'s Explicit MVP Exclusions and Current Development Phase — flag conflicts in an "Out of scope" section rather than omitting them silently. Save as `docs/prd/<kebab-case-name>-v1.md`. Present as a draft awaiting human review, not approved scope.
